title: liver metastasis 1_LM
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was prepared with QIAGEN ALLPrep DNA/RNA Micro Kit (Qiagen, CA,US)
extract_protocol_ch1.1: The mRNA libraries were separately generated from total RNA and constructed according to the standard Illumina mRNA library preparation (Illumina Inc, USA). Sequencing was done on the Illumina Nextseq 500 platform according to the manufacturer’s instructions
extract_protocol_ch1.2: Illumina Nextseq 500 platform according to the manufacturer’s instructions.
data_processing: Illumina Casava1.82 software used for basecalling.
data_processing.1: Clean reads were mapped to reference Homo sapiens transcriptome sequences from the UCSC website (hg19) using Bowtie2 and Tophat 2.0.1 software.
data_processing.3: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: tab-delimited text files include reads per kilobase per million (RPKM) for each gene
